content.en:
"Lord of the Word, why bother, this battle really has to be fought, you really have no Holy Land I'm afraid that many Legendary Realm Lords will die, even if it's a clone, it will also suffer heavy losses!"

Lord Wuheng said coldly.

"Maybe it's your Impermanence Holy Land that has suffered the most damage!" replied the Grimlord of the Word.

"Hmph, stubborn!"

Lord Impermanence was furious.

Although he may not be able to kill this clone of the Lord of the Underworld, the Legendary Realm Lords of the Immortal Holy Land can definitely easily kill those Legendary Realm Lords of the True Immortal Holy Land

Quantity is advantage!

Moreover, there are many powerhouses in the Immortal Holy Land who are at the extreme of ordinary Legendary Realm Lords, but there are few such Legendary Realm Lords in the True Immortal Holy Land.

In terms of strength, how can the True Immortal Holy Land compete with the Immortal Holy Land?

Time passed slowly, the atmosphere here became more and more tense, and now many creatures in "167" have fled, not daring to stay here, lest they be affected.

Just when the Superior Eternal Treasure was about to be conceived, the Legendary Realm Lords of the Immortal Holy Land made a move.

It was the Lord of Impermanence who took the lead, and the Lord of the Word also reacted quickly and stopped the Lord of Impermanence at the first time

Bang!!!

The two sides fought, and the Lord of the Dark Word directly dragged the Lord of Impermanence into the Long River of Time to fight.

In this way, it would be very difficult for their battles to affect ordinary Legendary Realm Lords.

-

"Kill!"

The Legendary Realm Lords of the Imperpetual Holy Land also made a move.

And one of Ye Tian's replica bodies appeared, and one of the replica bodies faced the Black Water Lord of the Impermanence Holy Land.

"Endless Lord, hmph, you are a new Legendary Realm Lord, and you dare to fight me!"

The Blackwater Lord said coldly.

He didn't know Ye Tian's strength, after all, Ye Tian was too low-key.

Therefore, he just regarded Ye Tian as an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord, at most comparable to a slightly more powerful Legendary Realm Lord.

As for the record at the Legendary Lord level, it was useless at all, even if it was rumored that Ye Tian had condensed the Supreme Legendary Body?

Moreover, there was no news that Ye Tian had killed the Trick Star Lord, so in the Void Region, Ye Tian's reputation was not very great.

"This battle is the battle of my fame, so let's make a name for myself with this clone of your Black Water Lord first. "

Ye Tian directly used his top eternal technique, Six Dao Fist!

Rumble!!!

Six fists hit the Blackwater Lord directly.

In an instant, the body of the Black Water Lord began to annihilate, and the surrounding space-time began to shatter, and everything turned into nothingness

"Top Eternal Technique!!

The Blackwater Lord was shocked in his heart.

In an instant, his doppelganger fell, and he was killed in one hit.

There is no 㳗地

The Black Water Lord's ontological feeling that Liu was killed, and his expression suddenly changed drastically.

"The Endless Lord killed in one move, he actually created a top-notch eternal technique, how is this possible?"

The Blackwater Lord couldn't believe this scene.

None of the newly promoted Peak Legendary Realm Lords will have top-notch Eternal Skills, and even Peak Legendary Realm Lords like the Lord of Impermanence will only have one top-notch Eternal Skill!

How difficult it is to create a top-notch Eternal Technique, not to mention that Ye Tian is only a Legendary Realm Lord, and has not been promoted to the peak Legendary Realm Lord, and it is many times more difficult to create a top-notch Eternal Technique.

Source Sea.

The murder of the Blackwater Lord clone completely shocked many Legendary Realm Lords.

Then, Ye Tian's duplicate body shot, and each move could kill a Legendary Realm Lord.

In an instant, one by one of the Legendary Realm Lord clones of the Immortal Holy Land was killed.

Wow!!!

More than a dozen Legendary Realm Lords besieged him, and they were directly blasted away by Ye Tian's six fists, and the six Legendary Realm Lords fell directly, and the others were hit hard.

Unstoppable!

They can't compete with Ye Tian, whoever fights will die.

In a short period of time, the Immortal Holy Land fell into the clones of twenty Legendary Realm Lords.

Although there are many Legendary Realm Lords in the Immortal Holy Land, there are only fifty or sixty of them, and they can't withstand such sacrifices!

The clones had fallen, and they didn't dare to send other clones and bodies to come, so at this time, there were almost no Legendary Realm Lords in the Immortal Holy Land here.

"Let's go!"

The other Legendary Realm Lords of the Wuheng Holy Land fled one by one, not daring to stay here any longer.

Even if it's just a clone, once it falls, not only are all the treasures on the body lost, but it will take a long time and resources to reunite a clone, so the loss will be very large........

Abrupt.

A finger poked, a finger that came from the river of time.

Ye Tian turned around and punched it, bursting out the power of the six fists.

But even so, his replica body was still knocked away, his body was cracked, and the injuries were not light.

However, he withstood the blow.

And then, a body was knocked out from the long river of time, and it was the Lord of Impermanence.

Just now, in order to attack Ye Tian, Lord Wuheng forcibly withstood the blow of the Lord of the Underworld, so he was slightly injured, but the impact was not great.

"You're not dead!"

Lord Wuheng was shocked.

He is a peak Legendary Realm Lord, and he can't kill a Legendary Realm Lord with one blow, how is this possible.

However, he knew roughly why.

Ye Tian created a top-notch eternal technique, thus weakening his attack, plus Ye Tian condensed the supreme eternal body, and the defensive eternal technique created was also good, so under the weakening layer by layer, Ye Tian's copy body was able to resist his attack.

If there was no Lord of the Underworld, it would not be difficult for him to kill Ye Tian.

But now, the Lord of the Dark Words is protecting Ye Tian, and he can't kill Ye Tian.

Besides, even if he really killed Ye Tian, it was just a clone, and it didn't make much sense to kill him.

"Endless Lord, if you kill so many clones of our Legendary Realm Lords in the Immortal Holy Land this time, your body will stay in the True Immortal Holy Land forever, otherwise I will kill you one day.

0.9 Lord Wuheng dropped this sentence and left directly.

And at this time, the Superior Eternal Treasure was completely bred, and the breath of the Superior Eternal Treasure permeated the entire Source Sea.

"Endless Lord, take this Superior Eternal Treasure. "

The Lord of the Word said.

"Thank you, Lord of the Word. "

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and grabbed the Superior Eternal Treasure, and soon touched this Superior Eternal Treasure, took it away, and put it away.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained this high-level eternal treasure.

Soon after, news of the battle spread.

Suddenly, the countless forces of the Eternal Sea were shocked, and even many peak Legendary Realm Lords were full of interest in Ye Tian.

From then on, Ye Tian's reputation really resounded in the void area. _
